character.name: East Asian Beauty Portrait
character.notes: No dedicated trigger token — uses purely descriptive prompts. Set trigger_token_override to 'beautiful Asian woman' in your config so the masking engine can anchor cross-attention maps to this concept. Recommended dtype: bfloat16. Weight file: auto-detected by diffusers (no weight_name needed).

character.name: TrpFrog Character Icon
character.notes: DreamBooth LoRA trained on 50 images of the trpfrog icon character. Strong, compact spatial footprint — ideal counterpart for two-subject spatial masking tests.

style.name: Chinese Line Art Style
style.notes: Traditional Chinese line drawing style. Good stress test for null-projection: this style aggressively rewrites global texture/rendering directions. Pair with a character LoRA to verify null-proj preserves face structure. Recommended dtype: bfloat16.

style.name: Pixel Art Style
style.notes: Most popular SD3.5 style LoRA (222 downloads/month). Best checkpoint: v2_000000300 (step 300). Place 'pixel art' at the start of the prompt for strongest effect. Very aggressive global style — excellent for measuring how much null-projection preserves subject identity. Recommended dtype: bfloat16.
